data.title: Capital Power Finalizes Wind Asset Sale to Axium
data.description:
Capital Power (TSE:CPX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Capital Power Corporation has successfully completed the sale of a 49% interest in its Quality Wind and Port Dover and Nanticoke Wind facilities to Axium Infrastructure, generating approximately $340 million in pre-tax cash proceeds. Capital Power will continue to operate the facilities and earn an asset management fee.

data.title: G2 Energy Explores Kansas Oil & Gas Acquisition
data.description:
G2 Energy (TSE:GTOO) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

G2 Energy Corp. has signed a Letter of Intent with Global Oil & Gas Recovery Corp. to explore the acquisition of the Shiloh Oil & Gas Leasehold in Southeast Kansas. This potential deal aims to revitalize abandoned wells using Enhanced Oil Recovery techniques, enhancing shareholder value through increased production. The partnership could unlock significant untapped resources in a region with a history of robust oil and gas production.

data.title: Washington Bancorp Repositions Balance Sheet for Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Washington Bancorp ( (WASH) ) has issued an announcement.

Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. announced a strategic repositioning of its balance sheet to support organic growth and capital generation. This involves selling low-yield assets and reinvesting in higher-yield securities, resulting in a short-term net loss but strengthening the bank’s financial position and improving profitability prospects for 2025.

More about Washington Bancorp

Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc., listed on NASDAQ as WASH, is a publicly-owned holding company for The Washington Trust Company, with assets totaling $7.1 billion as of September 30, 2024. Established in 1800, Washington Trust is the oldest community bank in the U.S., the largest state-chartered bank in Rhode Island, and a leading financial services company in the Northeast. The bank offers commercial banking, mortgage banking, personal banking, and wealth management services across Rhode Island, Connecticut, and Massachusetts, along with digital banking solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 0.75%

Average Trading Volume: 150,245

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $583.7M

For detailed information about WASH stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Roebuck Food Group PLC ( (GB:RFG) ) has shared an announcement.

Roebuck Food Group PLC announced that it successfully raised €10 million through a placing and subscription of ordinary shares, with directors and management participating in the investment. data.title: Ferrari Continues Strategic Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has shared an announcement.

Ferrari N.V. announced the completion of its sixth tranche of a multi-year share buyback program, purchasing additional common shares worth Euro 150 million. This initiative is a part of a larger Euro 2 billion buyback plan expected to conclude by 2026. The ongoing buyback program is aimed at optimizing Ferrari’s capital structure and providing value to its shareholders. To date, the company has invested over Euro 1.2 billion in repurchasing shares on the Euronext Milan and New York Stock Exchange.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V. is a prominent luxury sports car manufacturer based in Maranello, Italy. The company is renowned for producing high-performance vehicles and operates in the luxury automotive industry, focusing on innovation and excellence in design and engineering.

Average Trading Volume: 303,002

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $103B

data.title: Gatos Silver Enhances Management with Dowa Agreement
data.description:
Gatos Silver (GATO) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Gatos Silver has amended its agreements with Dowa, enhancing its management rights and allowing for complete financial statement consolidation of the Los Gatos Joint Venture (LGJV). The changes will streamline financial reporting and provide a clearer view of Gatos Silver’s performance, particularly ahead of its anticipated merger with First Majestic in January 2025.

data.title: Prosegur’s Helena Revoredo Retains Control Amid Syndication
data.description:
Prosegur Compania de Seguridad (ES:PSG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Prosegur Compañía de Seguridad, S.A. has announced that Helena Revoredo Delvecchio will maintain exclusive control over Gubel, S.L., the majority shareholder of Prosegur, despite holding less than 50% of its share capital. Through a syndication agreement, Revoredo will control the majority of the voting rights, ensuring her continued influence over the company and its subsidiary, Prosegur Cash, S.A.

Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) has provided an announcement.

Ryanair Holdings plc announced the purchase and cancellation of over 183,520 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buy-back program. This move, detailed in their latest financial report, reflects the company’s strategy to enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation, which can potentially increase the value of remaining shares.

data.title: Quiz PLC Plans Delisting from AIM to Enhance Operational Flexibility
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An update from QUIZ PLC ( (GB:QUIZ) ) is now available.

Quiz PLC has announced plans to voluntarily delist its ordinary shares from AIM and re-register as a private limited company, citing costs, limited liquidity, and challenging market conditions as factors. The company anticipates improved operational efficiency and cost savings, allowing for greater flexibility and potential growth opportunities as a private entity.

More about QUIZ PLC

Quiz PLC is an omni-channel women’s fashion brand specializing in occasion wear and dressy casual wear. It operates through a mix of online platforms, standalone stores, concessions, international franchises, third-party online partners, and wholesale, with over 60 stores and 40 concessions in the UK.

Tate & Lyle ( (GB:TATE) ) has provided an announcement.

Tate & Lyle PLC has executed a share buyback, repurchasing 190,585 of its ordinary shares from Merrill Lynch International as part of its ongoing programme announced in June 2024.
